message.HAMMER_EFFECT: Kinetic Impact Hazard: A 4.0mm+ stroke delivers high needle momentum. Reducing voltage by 1.5V is required to prevent the 'Hammer Effect' (sub-dermal scarring) during delicate shading.
message.GEOMETRY_DESYNC: Geometry Mismatch: Standard tapers create excessive skin displacement for micro-details. Super Long Taper (SLT) is recommended to prevent ink spread (blowouts).
message.VELOCITY_SYNC: Frequency/Velocity Desync: Your hand speed exceeds the machine's cycle rate. This may cause 'dashed' lines or skin snagging. Increase voltage or decelerate hand movement.
